narrative:
Freeport Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 482 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
